summary_en: 6.0M shares (6.2% S/O) - ¥600M upper limit - acquisition window Feb 26, 2026 – Feb 25, 2027. Method expanded from market purchases to include ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange purchases. No shares acquired as of May 15, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Partial Modification of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: MRK Holdings filed a modification to its treasury stock acquisition program on May 15, 2026. The authorization originally approved on February 25, 2026 set a limit of 6.0 million shares (6.2% of issued shares excluding treasury) and ¥600 million over the twelve-month period from February 26, 2026 to February 25, 2027. The company has now modified the acquisition method: in addition to market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, the program now permits off-exchange purchases via ToSTNeT-3. This expansion reflects management's intent to optimize capital efficiency and align capital policy with the operating environment, taking into account strategic investment opportunities and current treasury stock acquisition progress. As of the filing date, no shares had been acquired under the program.
